name: Spiking Daemon
description: Daemons with spike frequency adaptation (ON/OFF cycling). Shows the 'lava lamp' effect: daemons migrate and die. Key finding: dynamism without organization (Problem 4).

config.description: Spike frequency adaptation creates ON/OFF cycling. Daemons birth, migrate, and die — visually beautiful 'lava lamp' but does NOT produce topological organization. Dynamism is necessary but not sufficient.
